rulings.Case Title: ARCHIE KING ET AL VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL CO. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File An Answer-In-Intervention
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion/Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2026, for 9:00 AM Department 304, Line 1. Hartford Accident and Indemnity Company; American Guarantee and Liability Insurance Company; Century Indemnity Company as Successor to CCI Insurance Company as Successor to Insurance Company of North America; National Fire Insurance Company of Hartford Successor by Merger to Transcontinental Insurance Company; Pacific Indemnity Company; and Federal Insurance Company, ("Intervenors") solely in their capacities as insurers of Defendant Alta Mechanical's Motion for Leave to File an Answer-In-Intervention is OFF CALENDAR pursuant to Notice of Withdrawal filed March 13, 2026. =(304/EPS)

rulings.Case Title: DALE A HUME ET AL VS. A B C AUTO PARTS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: n Asbestos Law and Motion/Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, March 17, 2026, for 9:00 AM Department 304, Line 2. Defendant Target's Motion to Quash Plaintiffs' Complaint for Lack of Jurisdiction is OFF CALENDAR pursuant to Plaintiff Dale Ann Hume's Notice of Death filed March 3, 2026. Defendant Target's duplicate entry for a Motion to Quash Plaintiffs' Complaint for Lack of Jurisdiction is also OFF CALENDAR for the reason above. =(304/EPS)
